action.reasoning: Observation: baseline MAE 0.198 with Morgan-2048 + MLP, training still decreasing. Analysis: additional fingerprint types (MACCS) and feature standardization can improve signal. Longer training (200 epochs) may reduce MAE further. Decision: add MACCS keys (167 bits), standardize features, early stopping (patience=50), train up to 200 epochs and submit eval. Expect MAE ~0.15-0.17.
